lede: A look at October 13 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Paul Simon and Margaret Thatcher, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Maldives
events.desc: The Maldives announces its decision to withdraw from the Commonwealth of Nations.

events.title: Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571
events.desc: Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571 crashes in the Andes mountains. Twenty-eight survive the crash. All but 16 succumb before rescue on December 23.

events.title: Ankara
events.desc: Ankara becomes the capital of Turkey.

events.title: Miracle of the Sun
events.desc: The "Miracle of the Sun" is witnessed by an estimated 70,000 people in the Cova da Iria in Portugal.

events.title: Prince Arthur, Duke of Connaught and Strathearn
events.desc: Prince Arthur, Duke of Connaught and Strathearn, becomes the first Governor General of Canada of royal descent.

events.title: White House
events.desc: In Washington, D.C., the cornerstone of the United States Executive Mansion (known as the White House since 1818) is laid.

events.title: Rinchinbal Khan
events.desc: Rinchinbal Khan becomes the Khagan of the Mongols and Emperor of the Yuan dynasty, reigning for only 53 days.

events.title: Knights Templar
events.desc: Hundreds of the Knights Templar in France are arrested at dawn by King Philip the Fair, and later confess under torture to heresy.

events.title: Westminster Abbey
events.desc: The present church building at Westminster Abbey is consecrated.

events.title: AD 54
events.desc: Roman emperor Claudius dies from poisoning under mysterious circumstances. He is succeeded by his adopted son Nero, rather than by Britannicus, his son with Messalina.

births.name: Margaret Thatcher
births.line: English chemist and politician, Prime Minister of the United Kingdom

births.name: Dési Bouterse
births.line: Surinamese general and politician, 9th President of Suriname

births.name: Kurt Reidemeister
births.line: German mathematician connected to the Vienna Circle

deaths.text: Dario Fo, Italian playwright, actor, director, and composer Nobel Prize laureate
Louis Rwagasore, Burundi politician, Prime Minister of Burundi
Isaac Brock, English general and politician, Lieutenant Governor of Upper Canada
Emperor Jingzong of Liao, emperor of the Liao Dynasty

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Alexandrina of Balasar
Christian feast day: Daniel and companions, of Ceuta
